title: Thai Stir Fry
description: Quick and flavorful Thai-style stir fry made with a variety of vegetables and your choice of protein. Serve over rice for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the onion, carrots, and broccoli, and cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the ginger and garlic, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Thai red chili peppers and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the peppers are slightly softened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve over jasmine rice and enjoy!
